title: acer palmifolium var. nigrum
intro: Acer palmifolium var. nigrum, also known as Black Maple, is a variety of the Maple tree species. The leaves of this tree have been used in traditional medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of the Black Maple include relief from symptoms of rheumatism, skin conditions, and fever, as well as acting as a natural detoxifier. Herbal preparations of the Black Maple can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by mixing its dried leaves into salves and creams for topical application.
